107class UWorldProxy
108{
109public:
110
111 UWorldProxy() :
112 World(NULL)
113 {}
114
115 inline UWorld* operator->()
116 {
117 // GWorld is changed often on the game thread when in PIE, accessing on any other thread is going to be a race condition
118 // In general, the rendering thread should not dereference UObjects, unless there is a mechanism in place to make it safe
119 checkSlow(IsInGameThread());
120 return World;
121 }
122
123 inline const UWorld* operator->() const
124 {
125 checkSlow(IsInGameThread());
126 return World;
127 }
128
129 inline UWorld& operator*()
130 {
131 checkSlow(IsInGameThread());
132 return *World;
133 }
134
135 inline const UWorld& operator*() const
136 {
137 checkSlow(IsInGameThread());
138 return *World;
139 }
140
141 inline UWorldProxy& operator=(UWorld* InWorld)
142 {
143 World = InWorld;
144 return *this;
145 }
146
147 inline UWorldProxy& operator=(const UWorldProxy& InProxy)
148 {
149 World = InProxy.World;
150 return *this;
151 }
152
153 inline bool operator==(const UWorldProxy& Other) const
154 {
155 return World == Other.World;
156 }
157
158 inline operator UWorld*() const
159 {
160 checkSlow(IsInGameThread());
161 return World;
162 }
163
164 inline UWorld* GetReference()
165 {
166 checkSlow(IsInGameThread());
167 return World;
168 }
169
170private:
171
172 UWorld* World;
173};
174
175// List of delegates for the world being registered to an audio device.
176class FAudioDeviceWorldDelegates
177{
178public:
179 // Called whenever a world is registered to an audio device. UWorlds are not guaranteed to be registered to the same
180 // audio device throughout their lifecycle, and there is no guarantee on the lifespan of both the UWorld and the Audio
181 // Device registered in this callback.
182 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams(FOnWorldRegisteredToAudioDevice, const UWorld* /*InWorld */, Audio::FDeviceId /* AudioDeviceId*/);
183 static UE_API FOnWorldRegisteredToAudioDevice OnWorldRegisteredToAudioDevice;
184
185 // Called whenever a world is unregistered from an audio device. UWorlds are not guaranteed to be registered to the same
186 // audio device throughout their lifecycle, and there is no guarantee on the lifespan of both the UWorld and the Audio
187 // Device registered in this callback.
188 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams(FOnWorldUnregisteredWithAudioDevice, const UWorld* /*InWorld */, Audio::FDeviceId /* AudioDeviceId*/);
189 static UE_API FOnWorldUnregisteredWithAudioDevice OnWorldUnregisteredWithAudioDevice;
190};
191
193class FSeamlessTravelHandler
194{
195private:
197 FURL PendingTravelURL;
199 UObject* LoadedPackage;
201 UWorld* CurrentWorld;
203 UWorld* LoadedWorld;
205 bool bTransitionInProgress;
207 bool bSwitchedToDefaultMap;
209 bool bPauseAtMidpoint;
211 bool bNeedCancelCleanUp;
213 FName WorldContextHandle;
215 double SeamlessTravelStartTime = 0.0;
216
218 void CopyWorldData();
219
221 void SeamlessTravelLoadCallback(const FName& PackageName, UPackage* LevelPackage, EAsyncLoadingResult::Type Result);
222
223 void SetHandlerLoadedData(UObject* InLevelPackage, UWorld* InLoadedWorld);
224
226 bool StartLoadingMap(FString MapPackageToLoadFrom);
227
229 void StartLoadingDestination();
230
231public:
232 FSeamlessTravelHandler()
233 : PendingTravelURL(NoInit)
234 , LoadedPackage(NULL)
235 , CurrentWorld(NULL)
236 , LoadedWorld(NULL)
237 , bTransitionInProgress(false)
238 , bSwitchedToDefaultMap(false)
239 , bPauseAtMidpoint(false)
240 , bNeedCancelCleanUp(false)
241 {}
242
247 bool StartTravel(UWorld* InCurrentWorld, const FURL& InURL);
248
250 FORCEINLINE bool IsInTransition() const
251 {
252 return bTransitionInProgress;
253 }
254
255 FORCEINLINE bool HasSwitchedToDefaultMap() const
256 {
257 return IsInTransition() && bSwitchedToDefaultMap;
258 }
259
261 inline FString GetDestinationMapName() const
262 {
263 return (IsInTransition() ? PendingTravelURL.Map : TEXT(""));
264 }
265
267 inline const UWorld* GetLoadedWorld() const
268 {
269 return LoadedWorld;
270 }
271
273 void CancelTravel();
274
279 void SetPauseAtMidpoint(bool bNowPaused);
280
286 ENGINE_API UWorld* Tick();
287};
288

291USTRUCT()
292struct FLevelViewportInfo
293{
294 GENERATED_BODY()
295
296
297 UPROPERTY()
298 FVector CamPosition;
299
301 UPROPERTY()
302 FRotator CamRotation;
303
305 UPROPERTY()
306 float CamOrthoZoom;
307
309 UPROPERTY()
310 bool CamUpdated;
311
312 FLevelViewportInfo()
313 : CamPosition(FVector::ZeroVector)
314 , CamRotation(FRotator::ZeroRotator)
315 , CamOrthoZoom(DEFAULT_ORTHOZOOM)
316 , CamUpdated(false)
317 {
318 }
319
320 FLevelViewportInfo(const FVector& InCamPosition, const FRotator& InCamRotation, float InCamOrthoZoom)
321 : CamPosition(InCamPosition)
322 , CamRotation(InCamRotation)
323 , CamOrthoZoom(InCamOrthoZoom)
324 , CamUpdated(false)
325 {
326 }
327
328 // Needed for backwards compatibility for VER_UE4_ADD_EDITOR_VIEWS, can be removed along with it
329 friend FArchive& operator<<( FArchive& Ar, FLevelViewportInfo& I )
330 {
331 Ar << I.CamPosition;
332 Ar << I.CamRotation;
333 Ar << I.CamOrthoZoom;
334
335 if ( Ar.IsLoading() )
336 {
337 I.CamUpdated = true;
338
339 if ( I.CamOrthoZoom < MIN_ORTHOZOOM || I.CamOrthoZoom > MAX_ORTHOZOOM )
340 {
341 I.CamOrthoZoom = DEFAULT_ORTHOZOOM;
342 }
343 }
344
345 return Ar;
346 }
347};
348

372};

417/* Struct of optional parameters passed to SpawnActor function(s). */
418struct FActorSpawnParameters
419{
420 UE_API FActorSpawnParameters();
421
422 /* A name to assign as the Name of the Actor being spawned. If no value is specified, the name of the spawned Actor will be automatically generated using the form [Class]_[Number]. */
423 FName Name;
424
425 /* An Actor to use as a template when spawning the new Actor. The spawned Actor will be initialized using the property values of the template Actor. If left NULL the class default object (CDO) will be used to initialize the spawned Actor. */
426 AActor* Template;
427
428 /* The Actor that spawned this Actor. (Can be left as NULL). */
429 AActor* Owner;
430
431 /* The APawn that is responsible for damage done by the spawned Actor. (Can be left as NULL). */
432 APawn* Instigator;
433
434 /* The ULevel to spawn the Actor in, i.e. the Outer of the Actor. If left as NULL the Outer of the Owner is used. If the Owner is NULL the persistent level is used. */
435 class ULevel* OverrideLevel;
436
437#if WITH_EDITOR
438 /* The UPackage to set the Actor in. If left as NULL the Package will not be set and the actor will be saved in the same package as the persistent level. */
439 class UPackage* OverridePackage;
440
442 FStringView InitialActorLabel;
443
445 FGuid OverrideActorGuid;
446#endif
447
448 /* The parent component to set the Actor in. */
449 class UChildActorComponent* OverrideParentComponent;
450
452 ESpawnActorCollisionHandlingMethod SpawnCollisionHandlingOverride;
453
455 ESpawnActorScaleMethod TransformScaleMethod = ESpawnActorScaleMethod::MultiplyWithRoot;
456
457private:
458
459 friend class UPackageMapClient;
460
461#if UE_WITH_IRIS
462 friend class UNetActorFactory;
463#endif // UE_WITH_IRIS
464
465 /* Is the actor remotely owned. This should only be set true by the package map when it is creating an actor on a client that was replicated from the server. */
466 uint8 bRemoteOwned:1;
467
468public:
469
470 bool IsRemoteOwned() const { return bRemoteOwned; }
471
472 /* Determines whether spawning will not fail if certain conditions are not met. If true, spawning will not fail because the class being spawned is `bStatic=true` or because the class of the template Actor is not the same as the class of the Actor being spawned. */
473 uint8 bNoFail:1;
474
475 /* Determines whether the construction script will be run. If true, the construction script will not be run on the spawned Actor. Only applicable if the Actor is being spawned from a Blueprint. */
476 uint8 bDeferConstruction:1;
477
478 /* Determines whether or not the actor may be spawned when running a construction script. If true spawning will fail if a construction script is being run. */
479 uint8 bAllowDuringConstructionScript:1;
480
481#if !WITH_EDITOR
482 /* Force the spawned actor to use a globally unique name (provided name should be none). */
483 uint8 bForceGloballyUniqueName:1;
484#else
485 /* Determines whether the begin play cycle will run on the spawned actor when in the editor. */
486 uint8 bTemporaryEditorActor:1;
487
488 /* Determines whether or not the actor should be hidden from the Scene Outliner */
489 uint8 bHideFromSceneOutliner:1;
490
492 uint16 bCreateActorPackage:1;
493#endif
494
495 /* Modes that SpawnActor can use the supplied name when it is not None. */
496 enum class ESpawnActorNameMode : uint8
497 {
498 /* Fatal if unavailable, application will assert */
499 Required_Fatal,
500
501 /* Report an error return null if unavailable */
502 Required_ErrorAndReturnNull,
503
504 /* Return null if unavailable */
505 Required_ReturnNull,
506
507 /* If the supplied Name is already in use the generate an unused one using the supplied version as a base */
508 Requested
509 };
510
511 /* In which way should SpawnActor should treat the supplied Name if not none. */
512 ESpawnActorNameMode NameMode;
513
514 /* Flags used to describe the spawned actor/object instance. */
515 EObjectFlags ObjectFlags;
516
517 /* Custom function allowing the caller to specific a function to execute post actor construction but before other systems see this actor spawn. */
518 TFunction<void(AActor*)> CustomPreSpawnInitalization;
519};
520
521/* World actors spawmning helper functions */
522struct FActorSpawnUtils
523{
535 static UE_API FName MakeUniqueActorName(ULevel* Level, const UClass* Class, FName BaseName, bool bGloballyUnique);
536
543 static UE_API bool IsGloballyUniqueName(FName Name);
544
548 static UE_API FName GetBaseName(FName Name);
549};

551struct FActorsInitializedParams
552{
553 FActorsInitializedParams(UWorld* InWorld, bool InResetTime) : World(InWorld), ResetTime(InResetTime) {}
554 UWorld* World;
555 bool ResetTime;
556};

567struct FWorldAsyncTraceState
568{
569 UE_API FWorldAsyncTraceState();
570
572 FORCEINLINE AsyncTraceData& GetBufferForFrame (int32 Frame) { return DataBuffer[ Frame % 2]; }
574 FORCEINLINE AsyncTraceData& GetBufferForCurrentFrame () { return DataBuffer[ CurrentFrame % 2]; }
576 FORCEINLINE AsyncTraceData& GetBufferForPreviousFrame() { return DataBuffer[(CurrentFrame + 1) % 2]; }
577
579 AsyncTraceData DataBuffer[2];
580
582 int32 CurrentFrame;
583};
584

590
592 UObject* Outer = nullptr;
593
595 ERenameFlags Flags = REN_None;
596};

598/* FAsyncPreRegisterDDCRequest - info about an async DDC request that we're going to wait on before registering components */
599class FAsyncPreRegisterDDCRequest
600{
601 /* DDC Key used for the request */
602 FString DDCKey;
603
604 /* Handle for Async DDC request. 0 if no longer invalid. */
605 uint32 Handle;
606public:
608 FAsyncPreRegisterDDCRequest(const FString& InKey, uint32 InHandle)
609 : DDCKey(InKey)
610 , Handle(InHandle)
611 {}
612
614 UE_API ~FAsyncPreRegisterDDCRequest();
615
617 UE_API bool PollAsynchronousCompletion();
618
620 UE_API void WaitAsynchronousCompletion();
621
623 UE_API bool GetAsynchronousResults(TArray<uint8>& OutData);
624
626 const FString& GetKey() const { return DDCKey; }
627};
628#endif

634USTRUCT()
635struct FLevelCollection
636{
637 GENERATED_BODY()
638
639 UE_API FLevelCollection();
640
641 FLevelCollection(const FLevelCollection&) = delete;
642 FLevelCollection& operator=(const FLevelCollection&) = delete;
643
644 UE_API FLevelCollection(FLevelCollection&& Other);
645 UE_API FLevelCollection& operator=(FLevelCollection&& Other);
646
648 UE_API ~FLevelCollection();
649
651 ELevelCollectionType GetType() const { return CollectionType; }
652
654 void SetType(const ELevelCollectionType InType) { CollectionType = InType; }
655
657 AGameStateBase* GetGameState() const { return GameState; }
658
660 void SetGameState(AGameStateBase* const InGameState) { GameState = InGameState; }
661
663 UNetDriver* GetNetDriver() const { return NetDriver; }
664
666 void SetNetDriver(UNetDriver* const InNetDriver) { NetDriver = InNetDriver; }
667
669 UDemoNetDriver* GetDemoNetDriver() const { return DemoNetDriver; }
670
672 void SetDemoNetDriver(UDemoNetDriver* const InDemoNetDriver) { DemoNetDriver = InDemoNetDriver; }
673
675 const TSet<TObjectPtr<ULevel>>& GetLevels() const { return Levels; }
676
678 UE_API void AddLevel(ULevel* const Level);
679
681 UE_API void RemoveLevel(ULevel* const Level);
682
684 UE_API void SetPersistentLevel(ULevel* const Level);
685
687 ULevel* GetPersistentLevel() const { return PersistentLevel; }
688
690 bool IsVisible() const { return bIsVisible; }
691
693 void SetIsVisible(const bool bInIsVisible) { bIsVisible = bInIsVisible; }
694
695private:
697 ELevelCollectionType CollectionType;
698
703 bool bIsVisible;
704
709 UPROPERTY()
710 TObjectPtr<class AGameStateBase> GameState;
711
716 UPROPERTY()
717 TObjectPtr<class UNetDriver> NetDriver;
718
723 UPROPERTY()
724 TObjectPtr<class UDemoNetDriver> DemoNetDriver;
725
730 UPROPERTY()
731 TObjectPtr<class ULevel> PersistentLevel;
732
734 UPROPERTY()
735 TSet<TObjectPtr<ULevel>> Levels;
736};
737
738template<>
739struct TStructOpsTypeTraits<FLevelCollection> : public TStructOpsTypeTraitsBase2<FLevelCollection>
740{
741 enum
742 {
743 WithCopy = false
744 };
745};

753{

773 UE_API FScopedLevelCollectionContextSwitch(int32 InLevelCollectionIndex, UWorld* const InWorld);

783USTRUCT()
784struct FStreamingLevelsToConsider
785{
786 GENERATED_BODY()
787
788 FStreamingLevelsToConsider()
789 : StreamingLevelsBeingConsidered(0)
790 {}
791
792private:
793
795 UPROPERTY()
796 TArray<TObjectPtr<ULevelStreaming>> StreamingLevels;
797
798 enum class EProcessReason : uint8
799 {
800 Add,
801 Reevaluate
802 };
803
805 TSortedMap<TObjectPtr<ULevelStreaming>, EProcessReason> LevelsToProcess;
806
808 int32 StreamingLevelsBeingConsidered;
809
814 UE_API void Add_Internal(ULevelStreaming* StreamingLevel, bool bGuaranteedNotInContainer);
815
816public:
817
818 const TArray<TObjectPtr<ULevelStreaming>>& GetStreamingLevels() const { return StreamingLevels; }
819
820 UE_API void AddReferencedObjects(UObject* InThis, FReferenceCollector& Collector);
821
822 UE_API void BeginConsideration();
823 UE_API void EndConsideration();
824 bool AreStreamingLevelsBeingConsidered() { return StreamingLevelsBeingConsidered > 0; }
825
827 void Add(ULevelStreaming* StreamingLevel) { Add_Internal(StreamingLevel, false); }
828
829 /* Remove an element from the container. */
830 UE_API bool Remove(ULevelStreaming* StreamingLevel);
831
832 /* Remove the element at a given index from the container. */
833 UE_API void RemoveAt(int32 Index);
834
835 /* Returns if an element is in the container. */
836 UE_API bool Contains(ULevelStreaming* StreamingLevel) const;
837
838 /* Resets the container to an empty state without freeing array memory. */
839 UE_API void Reset();
840
841 /* Instructs the container that state changed such that the position in the priority sorted array the level may no longer be correct. */
842 UE_API void Reevaluate(ULevelStreaming* StreamingLevel);
843};

879struct FDeferredComponentMoveData
880{
881 FDeferredComponentMoveData() = default;
882
886 TWeakObjectPtr<USceneComponent> ComponentToMove = nullptr;
887
888 FTransform InitialTransform;
889
890 FScopedMovementUpdate::TScopedOverlapInfoArray PendingOverlaps;
891
892 FScopedMovementUpdate::TScopedBlockingHitArray BlockingHits;
893
894 bool bHasTransformMovedForGroupUpdate = false;
895
896 bool bHasMoved = false;
897
898 FScopedMovementUpdate::EOverlapState OverlapState = FScopedMovementUpdate::EOverlapState::eUnknown;
899
900 ETeleportType TeleportType = ETeleportType::None;
901
902 // If not INDEX_NONE, overlaps at this index and beyond in PendingOverlaps are at the final destination
903 int32 FinalOverlapCandidatesIndex = INDEX_NONE;
904};

918UCLASS(MinimalAPI, customConstructor, config=Engine)
919class UWorld final : public UObject, public FNetworkNotify
920{
921 GENERATED_UCLASS_BODY()
922
923 UE_API ~UWorld();
924
925#if WITH_EDITORONLY_DATA
927 UPROPERTY(Transient)
928 TArray< TObjectPtr<class ULayer> > Layers;
929
930 // Group actors currently "active"
931 UPROPERTY(Transient)
932 TArray<TObjectPtr<AActor>> ActiveGroupActors;
933
935 UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, Instanced, Category=Thumbnail)
936 TObjectPtr<class UThumbnailInfo> ThumbnailInfo;
937#endif // WITH_EDITORONLY_DATA
938
940 UPROPERTY(Transient)
941 TObjectPtr<class ULevel> PersistentLevel;
942
944 UPROPERTY(Transient)
945 TObjectPtr<class UNetDriver> NetDriver;
946
948 UE_DEPRECATED(5.6, "Please use GetLineBatcher(UWorld::ELineBatcherType::World")
949 UPROPERTY(Transient)
950 TObjectPtr<class ULineBatchComponent> LineBatcher_DEPRECATED;
951
953 UE_DEPRECATED(5.6, "Please use GetLineBatcher(UWorld::ELineBatcherType::WorldPersistent")
954 UPROPERTY(Transient)
955 TObjectPtr<class ULineBatchComponent> PersistentLineBatcher_DEPRECATED;
956
958 UE_DEPRECATED(5.6, "Please use GetLineBatcher(UWorld::ELineBatcherType::Foreground")
959 UPROPERTY(Transient)
960 TObjectPtr<class ULineBatchComponent> ForegroundLineBatcher_DEPRECATED;
961
963 UPROPERTY(Transient)
964 TObjectPtr<class AGameNetworkManager> NetworkManager;
965
967 UPROPERTY(Transient)
968 TObjectPtr<class UPhysicsCollisionHandler> PhysicsCollisionHandler;
969
971 UPROPERTY(Transient)
972 TObjectPtr<class UPhysicsQueryHandler> PhysicsQueryHandler;
973
975 UPROPERTY(Transient)
976 TArray<TObjectPtr<UObject>> ExtraReferencedObjects;
977
983 UPROPERTY(Transient)
984 TArray<TObjectPtr<UObject>> PerModuleDataObjects;
985
986private:
988 UPROPERTY(Transient)
989 TArray<TObjectPtr<ULevelStreaming>> StreamingLevels;
990
992 UPROPERTY(Transient, DuplicateTransient)
993 FStreamingLevelsToConsider StreamingLevelsToConsider;
994
995 UPROPERTY(Transient, DuplicateTransient)
996 TObjectPtr<AServerStreamingLevelsVisibility> ServerStreamingLevelsVisibility;
997
998public:
999 enum class ELineBatcherType : uint8
1000 {
1001 World = 0,
1002 WorldPersistent,
1003 Foreground,
1004 ForegroundPersistent,
1005 // --- ---
1006 NUM,
1007 Invalid = NUM
1008 };
1009

2624 template< class T >
2625 T* GetFirstPlayerController() const
2626 {
2627 return Cast<T>(GetFirstPlayerController());

2631 UE_API APlayerController* GetFirstPlayerController() const;
2632
2633 /*
2634 * Get the first valid local player via the first player controller.
2635 *
2636 * @return Pointer to the first valid ULocalPlayer cast to the template type, or NULL if there is not one.
2637 *
2638 * May Return NULL if the cast fails.
2639 */
2640 template< class T >
2641 T* GetFirstLocalPlayerFromController() const
2642 {
2643 return Cast<T>(GetFirstLocalPlayerFromController());
2644 }
2645
2646 /*
2647 * Get the first valid local player via the first player controller.
2648 *
2649 * @return Pointer to the first valid ULocalPlayer, or NULL if there is not one.
2650 */
2651 UE_API ULocalPlayer* GetFirstLocalPlayerFromController() const;

2819
2823 static bool IsPartitionedWorld(const UWorld* InWorld)
2824 {
2825 if (InWorld)
2826 {
2827 return InWorld->IsPartitionedWorld();
2828 }
2829
2830 return false;
2831 }
2832
2833 FWorldPartitionInitializedEvent& OnWorldPartitionInitialized() { return OnWorldPartitionInitializedEvent; }
2834 FWorldPartitionUninitializedEvent& OnWorldPartitionUninitialized() { return OnWorldPartitionUninitializedEvent; }

2976 //~ Begin UObject Interface
2977 UE_API virtual void Serialize( FArchive& Ar ) override;
2978 UE_API virtual void BeginDestroy() override;
2979 UE_API virtual void FinishDestroy() override;
2980 UE_API virtual bool IsReadyForFinishDestroy() override;
2981 UE_API virtual void PostLoad() override;
2982#if WITH_EDITORONLY_DATA
2983 static UE_API void DeclareConstructClasses(TArray<FTopLevelAssetPath>& OutConstructClasses, const UClass* SpecificSubclass);
2984#endif
2985 UE_API virtual void PreDuplicate(FObjectDuplicationParameters& DupParams) override;
2986 UE_API virtual void PreSaveRoot(FObjectPreSaveRootContext ObjectSaveContext) override;
2987 UE_API virtual void PostSaveRoot(FObjectPostSaveRootContext ObjectSaveContext) override;
2988 UE_API virtual UWorld* GetWorld() const override;
2989 UE_API virtual FPrimaryAssetId GetPrimaryAssetId() const override;
2990 static UE_API void AddReferencedObjects(UObject* InThis, FReferenceCollector& Collector);
2991#if WITH_EDITOR
2992 UE_API virtual EDataValidationResult IsDataValid(FDataValidationContext& Context) const override;
2993 UE_API virtual bool Rename(const TCHAR* NewName = NULL, UObject* NewOuter = NULL, ERenameFlags Flags = REN_None) override;
2994 UE_API virtual void GetAssetRegistryTags(FAssetRegistryTagsContext Context) const override;
2995 UE_DEPRECATED(5.4, "Implement the version that takes FAssetRegistryTagsContext instead.")
2996 UE_API virtual void GetAssetRegistryTags(TArray<FAssetRegistryTag>& OutTags) const override;
2997 UE_API virtual void GetAssetRegistryTagMetadata(TMap<FName, FAssetRegistryTagMetadata>& OutMetadata) const override;
2998 UE_API virtual void GetExtendedAssetRegistryTagsForSave(const ITargetPlatform* TargetPlatform, TArray<FAssetRegistryTag>& OutTags) const override;
2999protected:
3000 UE_API virtual void ThreadedPostLoadAssetRegistryTagsOverride(FPostLoadAssetRegistryTagsContext& Context) const;
3001public:
3002 UE_API virtual bool IsNameStableForNetworking() const override;
3003#endif
3004 UE_API virtual bool ResolveSubobject(const TCHAR* SubObjectPath, UObject*& OutObject, bool bLoadIfExists) override;
3005 UE_API virtual void PostDuplicate(bool bDuplicateForPIE) override;
3006 //~ End UObject Interface

3080
3081 UE_DEPRECATED(5.6, "Use version that requires passing the ExternalTimout, bConsiderTimeLimit now defaults to false to match common usage")
3082 void AddToWorld(ULevel* Level, const FTransform& LevelTransform, bool bConsiderTimeLimit, FNetLevelVisibilityTransactionId TransactionId, ULevelStreaming* OwningLevelStreaming = nullptr)
3083 {
3084 AddToWorld(Level, LevelTransform, bConsiderTimeLimit, TOptional<const UE::FTimeout>(), TransactionId, OwningLevelStreaming);
3085 }

3098 UE_DEPRECATED(5.6, "Use version that requires passing the optional ExternalTimout")

3100 {
3101 RemoveFromWorld(Level, bAllowIncrementalRemoval, TOptional<const UE::FTimeout>(), TransactionId, OwningLevelStreaming);
3102 }

3584 UE_API AActor* SpawnActor( UClass* InClass, FVector const* Location=NULL, FRotator const* Rotation=NULL, const FActorSpawnParameters& SpawnParameters = FActorSpawnParameters() );
3594 UE_API AActor* SpawnActor( UClass* Class, FTransform const* Transform, const FActorSpawnParameters& SpawnParameters = FActorSpawnParameters());
3595
3605 UE_API AActor* SpawnActorAbsolute( UClass* Class, FTransform const& AbsoluteTransform, const FActorSpawnParameters& SpawnParameters = FActorSpawnParameters());
3606
3608 template< class T >
3609 T* SpawnActor( const FActorSpawnParameters& SpawnParameters = FActorSpawnParameters() )
3610 {
3611 return CastChecked<T>(SpawnActor(T::StaticClass(), NULL, NULL, SpawnParameters),ECastCheckedType::NullAllowed);
3612 }
3613
3615 template< class T >
3616 T* SpawnActor( FVector const& Location, FRotator const& Rotation, const FActorSpawnParameters& SpawnParameters = FActorSpawnParameters() )
3617 {
3618 return CastChecked<T>(SpawnActor(T::StaticClass(), &Location, &Rotation, SpawnParameters),ECastCheckedType::NullAllowed);
3619 }
3620
3622 template< class T >
3623 T* SpawnActor( UClass* Class, const FActorSpawnParameters& SpawnParameters = FActorSpawnParameters() )
3624 {
3625 return CastChecked<T>(SpawnActor(Class, NULL, NULL, SpawnParameters),ECastCheckedType::NullAllowed);
3626 }
3627
3632 template< class T >
3633 T* SpawnActor( UClass* Class, FVector const& Location, FRotator const& Rotation, const FActorSpawnParameters& SpawnParameters = FActorSpawnParameters() )
3634 {
3635 return CastChecked<T>(SpawnActor(Class, &Location, &Rotation, SpawnParameters),ECastCheckedType::NullAllowed);
3636 }
3637
3641 template< class T >
3642 T* SpawnActor(UClass* Class, FTransform const& Transform,const FActorSpawnParameters& SpawnParameters = FActorSpawnParameters())
3643 {
3644 return CastChecked<T>(SpawnActor(Class, &Transform, SpawnParameters), ECastCheckedType::NullAllowed);
3645 }
3646
3648 template< class T >
3649 T* SpawnActorAbsolute(FVector const& AbsoluteLocation, FRotator const& AbsoluteRotation, const FActorSpawnParameters& SpawnParameters = FActorSpawnParameters())
3650 {
3651 return CastChecked<T>(SpawnActorAbsolute(T::StaticClass(), FTransform(AbsoluteRotation, AbsoluteLocation), SpawnParameters), ECastCheckedType::NullAllowed);
3652 }
3653
3658 template< class T >
3659 T* SpawnActorAbsolute(UClass* Class, FTransform const& Transform,const FActorSpawnParameters& SpawnParameters = FActorSpawnParameters())
3660 {
3661 return CastChecked<T>(SpawnActorAbsolute(Class, Transform, SpawnParameters), ECastCheckedType::NullAllowed);
3662 }
3663
3669 template< class T >
3670 T* SpawnActorDeferred(
3671 UClass* Class,
3672 FTransform const& Transform,
3673 AActor* Owner = nullptr,
3674 APawn* Instigator = nullptr,
3675 ESpawnActorCollisionHandlingMethod CollisionHandlingOverride = ESpawnActorCollisionHandlingMethod::Undefined,
3676 ESpawnActorScaleMethod TransformScaleMethod = ESpawnActorScaleMethod::MultiplyWithRoot
3677 )
3678 {
3679 if( Owner )
3680 {
3681 check(this==Owner->GetWorld());
3682 }
3683 FActorSpawnParameters SpawnInfo;
3684 SpawnInfo.SpawnCollisionHandlingOverride = CollisionHandlingOverride;
3685 SpawnInfo.TransformScaleMethod = TransformScaleMethod;
3686 SpawnInfo.Owner = Owner;
3687 SpawnInfo.Instigator = Instigator;
3688 SpawnInfo.bDeferConstruction = true;
3689 return (Class != nullptr) ? Cast<T>(SpawnActor(Class, &Transform, SpawnInfo)) : nullptr;
3690 }

4116
4120 UWorldSubsystem* GetSubsystemBase(TSubclassOf<UWorldSubsystem> SubsystemClass) const
4121 {
4122 return SubsystemCollection.GetSubsystem<UWorldSubsystem>(SubsystemClass);
4123 }
4124
4128 template <typename TSubsystemClass>
4129 TSubsystemClass* GetSubsystem() const
4130 {
4131 return SubsystemCollection.GetSubsystem<TSubsystemClass>(TSubsystemClass::StaticClass());
4132 }
4133
4138 template <typename TSubsystemClass>
4139 static FORCEINLINE TSubsystemClass* GetSubsystem(const UWorld* World)
4140 {
4141 if (World)
4142 {
4143 return World->GetSubsystem<TSubsystemClass>();
4144 }
4145 return nullptr;
4146 }
4147
4151 template <typename TSubsystemClass>
4152 bool HasSubsystem() const
4153 {
4154 return GetSubsystem<TSubsystemClass>() != nullptr;
4155 }
4156
4161 template <typename TSubsystemClass>
4162 static FORCEINLINE bool HasSubsystem(const UWorld* World)
4163 {
4164 return GetSubsystem<TSubsystemClass>(World) != nullptr;
4165 }
4166
4172 template <typename TSubsystemClass>
4173 UE_DEPRECATED(5.4, "This function is unsafe for re-entrancy and has been deprecated. Use GetSubsystemArrayCopy or ForEachSubsystem instead")
4174 const TArray<TSubsystemClass*>& GetSubsystemArray() const
4175 {
4176 return SubsystemCollection.GetSubsystemArray<TSubsystemClass>(TSubsystemClass::StaticClass());
4177 }
4178
4184 template <typename TSubsystemClass>
4185 TArray<TSubsystemClass*> GetSubsystemArrayCopy() const
4186 {
4187 return SubsystemCollection.GetSubsystemArrayCopy<TSubsystemClass>(TSubsystemClass::StaticClass());
4188 }
4189
4193 template <typename TSubsystemClass>
4194 void ForEachSubsystem(TFunctionRef<void(TSubsystemClass*)> Operation) const
4195 {
4196 static_assert(TIsDerivedFrom<TSubsystemClass, UWorldSubsystem>::IsDerived, "TSubsystemClass must be derived from UWorldSubsystem");
4197 return SubsystemCollection.ForEachSubsystem([Operation=MoveTemp(Operation)](UWorldSubsystem* Subsystem){
4198 Operation(CastChecked<TSubsystemClass>(Subsystem));
4199 }, TSubsystemClass::StaticClass());
4200 }
4201
4203 inline void SetGameInstance(UGameInstance* NewGI)
4204 {
4205 OwningGameInstance = NewGI;
4206 }
4207
4208 inline UGameInstance* GetGameInstance() const
4209 {
4210 return OwningGameInstance;
4211 }
4212
4214 template<class T>
4215 T* GetGameInstance() const
4216 {
4217 return Cast<T>(OwningGameInstance);
4218 }
4219
4221 template<class T>
4222 T* GetGameInstanceChecked() const
4223 {
4224 return CastChecked<T>(OwningGameInstance);
4225 }

4301extern ENGINE_API class UWorldProxy GWorld;
4302
4304class FWorldDelegates
4305{
4306public:
4307 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams(FWorldInitializationEvent, UWorld* /*World*/, const UWorld::InitializationValues /*IVS*/);
4308 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_ThreeParams(FWorldCleanupEvent, UWorld* /*World*/, bool /*bSessionEnded*/, bool /*bCleanupResources*/);
4309 DECLARE_TS_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FWorldEvent, UWorld* /*World*/);
4310
4319 typedef TMap<UObject*, UObject*> FReplacementMap; // Typedef needed so the macro below can properly digest comma in template parameters.
4320 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_FourParams(FWorldPostDuplicateEvent, UWorld* /*World*/, bool /*bDuplicateForPIE*/, FReplacementMap& /*ReplacementMap*/, TArray<UObject*>& /*ObjectsToFixReferences*/);
4321
4322#if WITH_EDITOR
4323 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_FiveParams(FWorldPreRenameEvent, UWorld* /*World*/, const TCHAR* /*InName*/, UObject* /*NewOuter*/, ERenameFlags /*Flags*/, bool& /*bShouldFailRename*/);
4324 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FWorldPostRenameEvent, UWorld*);
4325 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_ThreeParams(FWorldCurrentLevelChangedEvent, ULevel* /*NewLevel*/, ULevel* /*OldLevel*/, UWorld* /*World*/);
4326#endif // WITH_EDITOR
4327
4328 // Delegate type for level change events
4329 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams(FOnLevelChanged, ULevel*, UWorld*);
4330
4331 // delegate for generating world asset registry tags so project/game scope can add additional tags for filtering levels in their UI, etc
4332 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams(FWorldGetAssetTagsWithContext, const UWorld*, FAssetRegistryTagsContext);
4333 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams(FWorldGetAssetTags, const UWorld*, TArray<UObject::FAssetRegistryTag>&);
4334
4335 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_ThreeParams(FOnWorldTickStart, UWorld*, ELevelTick, float);
4336 static UE_API FOnWorldTickStart OnWorldTickStart;
4337
4338 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_ThreeParams(FOnWorldTickEnd, UWorld*, ELevelTick, float);
4339 static UE_API FOnWorldTickEnd OnWorldTickEnd;
4340
4341 // Delegate called before actors are ticked for each world. Delta seconds is already dilated and clamped.
4342 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_ThreeParams(FOnWorldPreActorTick, UWorld* /*World*/, ELevelTick, float);
4343 static UE_API FOnWorldPreActorTick OnWorldPreActorTick;
4344
4345 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_ThreeParams(FOnWorldPostActorTick, UWorld* /*World*/, ELevelTick, float);
4346 static UE_API FOnWorldPostActorTick OnWorldPostActorTick;
4347
4348 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnWorldPreSendAllEndOfFrameUpdates, UWorld* /*World*/);
4349 static UE_API FOnWorldPreSendAllEndOfFrameUpdates OnWorldPreSendAllEndOfFrameUpdates;
4350
4351 // Callback for world creation
4352 static UE_API FWorldEvent OnPostWorldCreation;
4353
4354 // Callback for world initialization (pre)
4355 static UE_API FWorldInitializationEvent OnPreWorldInitialization;
4356
4357 // Callback for world initialization (post)
4358 static UE_API FWorldInitializationEvent OnPostWorldInitialization;
4359
4360#if WITH_EDITOR
4361 // Callback for world rename event (pre)
4362 static UE_API FWorldPreRenameEvent OnPreWorldRename;
4363
4364 // Callback for world rename event (post)
4365 static UE_API FWorldPostRenameEvent OnPostWorldRename;
4366
4367 static UE_API FWorldCurrentLevelChangedEvent OnCurrentLevelChanged;
4368
4369 // PIE has started
4370 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnWorldPIEStarted, UGameInstance*);
4371 static UE_API FOnWorldPIEStarted OnPIEStarted;
4372
4373 // PIE is ready
4374 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnWorldPIEReady, UGameInstance*);
4375 static UE_API FOnWorldPIEStarted OnPIEReady;
4376
4377 // PIE map is created
4378 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnWorldPIEMapCreated, UGameInstance*);
4379 static UE_API FOnWorldPIEMapCreated OnPIEMapCreated;
4380
4381 // PIE map is created
4382 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnWorldPIEMapReady, UGameInstance*);
4383 static UE_API FOnWorldPIEMapReady OnPIEMapReady;
4384
4385 // PIE has ended
4386 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnWorldPIEEnded, UGameInstance*);
4387 static UE_API FOnWorldPIEEnded OnPIEEnded;
4388
4389 // Callback to add references when Serialize is called during SavePackage
4390 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams(FWorldCollectSaveReferencesEvent, UWorld*, FArchive&);
4391 static UE_API FWorldCollectSaveReferencesEvent OnCollectSaveReferences;
4392#endif // WITH_EDITOR
4393
4394 // Post duplication event.
4395 static UE_API FWorldPostDuplicateEvent OnPostDuplicate;
4396
4397 // Callback for world cleanup start
4398 static UE_API FWorldCleanupEvent OnWorldCleanup;
4399
4400 // Callback for world cleanup end
4401 static UE_API FWorldCleanupEvent OnPostWorldCleanup;
4402
4403 // Callback for world destruction (only called for initialized worlds)
4404 static UE_API FWorldEvent OnPreWorldFinishDestroy;
4405
4406 // Sent when a ULevel is added to the world via UWorld::AddToWorld
4407 static UE_API FOnLevelChanged LevelAddedToWorld;
4408
4409 // Sent before a ULevel is removed from the world via UWorld::RemoveFromWorld or
4410 // LoadMap (a NULL object means the LoadMap case, because all levels will be
4411 // removed from the world without a RemoveFromWorld call for each)
4412 static UE_API FOnLevelChanged PreLevelRemovedFromWorld;
4413
4414 // Sent when a ULevel is removed from the world via UWorld::RemoveFromWorld or
4415 // LoadMap (a NULL object means the LoadMap case, because all levels will be
4416 // removed from the world without a RemoveFromWorld call for each)
4417 static UE_API FOnLevelChanged LevelRemovedFromWorld;
4418
4419 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams(FLevelComponentsEvent, UWorld*, ULevel*);
4420
4422 static UE_API FLevelComponentsEvent LevelComponentsCleared;
4423
4425 static UE_API FLevelComponentsEvent LevelComponentsUpdated;
4426
4427 // Called after offset was applied to a level
4428 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_FourParams(FLevelOffsetEvent, ULevel*, UWorld*, const FVector&, bool);
4429 static UE_API FLevelOffsetEvent PostApplyLevelOffset;
4430
4431 // Called after transform is applied to level
4432 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams(FLevelTransformEvent, ULevel*, const FTransform&);
4433 static UE_API FLevelTransformEvent PostApplyLevelTransform;
4434
4435 // called by UWorld::GetAssetRegistryTags()
4436 static UE_API FWorldGetAssetTagsWithContext GetAssetTagsWithContext;
4437 UE_DEPRECATED(5.4, "Subscribe to GetAssetTagsWithContext instead")
4438 static UE_API FWorldGetAssetTags GetAssetTags;
4439
4440#if WITH_EDITOR
4441 // Delegate called when levelscript actions need refreshing
4442 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FRefreshLevelScriptActionsEvent, UWorld*);
4443
4444 // Called when changes in the levels require blueprint actions to be refreshed.
4445 static UE_API FRefreshLevelScriptActionsEvent RefreshLevelScriptActions;
4446#endif
4447
4448 // Global Callback after actors have been initialized (on any world)
4449 static UE_API UWorld::FOnWorldInitializedActors OnWorldInitializedActors;
4450
4451 // Global Callback when an initialized world begins to tear down before cleanup
4452 static UE_API FWorldEvent OnWorldBeginTearDown;
4453
4454 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams(FOnSeamlessTravelStart, UWorld*, const FString&);
4455 static UE_API FOnSeamlessTravelStart OnSeamlessTravelStart;
4456
4457 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnSeamlessTravelTransition, UWorld*);
4458 static UE_API FOnSeamlessTravelTransition OnSeamlessTravelTransition;
4459
4460 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams(FOnNetDriverCreated, UWorld*, UNetDriver*);
4461 static UE_API FOnNetDriverCreated OnNetDriverCreated;
4462
4463 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams(FOnCopyWorldData, UWorld*, UWorld*);
4464 static UE_API FOnCopyWorldData OnCopyWorldData;
4465
4466 DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FGameInstanceEvent, UGameInstance* /*GameInstance*/);
4467 static UE_API FGameInstanceEvent OnStartGameInstance;
4468
4469private:
4470 FWorldDelegates() {}
4471};
4472
4474struct FWorldNotifyStreamingLevelLoading
4475{
4476private:
4477 static void Started(UWorld* World)
4478 {
4479 ++World->NumStreamingLevelsBeingLoaded;
4480 }
4481
4482 static void Finished(UWorld* World)
4483 {
4484 if (ensure(World->NumStreamingLevelsBeingLoaded > 0))
4485 {
4486 --World->NumStreamingLevelsBeingLoaded;
4487 }
4488 }
4489
4490 friend ULevelStreaming;
4491};
4492
4494// UWorld inlines:
4495
4496FORCEINLINE_DEBUGGABLE double UWorld::GetTimeSeconds() const
4497{
4498 return TimeSeconds;
4499}
4500
4501FORCEINLINE_DEBUGGABLE double UWorld::GetUnpausedTimeSeconds() const
4502{
4503 return UnpausedTimeSeconds;
4504}
4505
4506FORCEINLINE_DEBUGGABLE double UWorld::GetRealTimeSeconds() const
4507{
4508 checkSlow(!IsInActualRenderingThread());
4509 return RealTimeSeconds;
4510}
4511
4512FORCEINLINE_DEBUGGABLE double UWorld::GetAudioTimeSeconds() const
4513{
4514 return AudioTimeSeconds;
4515}
4516
4517FORCEINLINE_DEBUGGABLE float UWorld::GetDeltaSeconds() const
4518{
4519 return DeltaTimeSeconds;
4520}
4521
4522FORCEINLINE_DEBUGGABLE FGameTime UWorld::GetTime() const
4523{
4524 return FGameTime::CreateDilated(
4525 RealTimeSeconds, DeltaRealTimeSeconds,
4526 TimeSeconds, DeltaTimeSeconds);
4527}
4528
4529FORCEINLINE_DEBUGGABLE double UWorld::TimeSince(double Time) const
4530{
4531 return GetTimeSeconds() - Time;
4532}
4533
4534FORCEINLINE_DEBUGGABLE FConstPhysicsVolumeIterator UWorld::GetNonDefaultPhysicsVolumeIterator() const
4535{
4536 auto Result = NonDefaultPhysicsVolumeList.CreateConstIterator();
4537 return (const FConstPhysicsVolumeIterator&)Result;
4538}
4539
4540FORCEINLINE_DEBUGGABLE int32 UWorld::GetNonDefaultPhysicsVolumeCount() const
4541{
4542 return NonDefaultPhysicsVolumeList.Num();
4543}
4544
4545FORCEINLINE_DEBUGGABLE bool UWorld::ComponentOverlapMulti(TArray<struct FOverlapResult>& OutOverlaps, const class UPrimitiveComponent* PrimComp, const FVector& Pos, const FRotator& Rot, const FComponentQueryParams& Params, const FCollisionObjectQueryParams& ObjectQueryParams) const
4546{
4547 // Pass through to FQuat version.
4548 return ComponentOverlapMulti(OutOverlaps, PrimComp, Pos, Rot.Quaternion(), Params, ObjectQueryParams);
4549}
4550
4551FORCEINLINE_DEBUGGABLE bool UWorld::ComponentOverlapMultiByChannel(TArray<struct FOverlapResult>& OutOverlaps, const class UPrimitiveComponent* PrimComp, const FVector& Pos, const FRotator& Rot, ECollisionChannel TraceChannel, const FComponentQueryParams& Params /* = FComponentQueryParams::DefaultComponentQueryParams */, const FCollisionObjectQueryParams& ObjectQueryParams/* =FCollisionObjectQueryParams::DefaultObjectQueryParam */) const
4552{
4553 // Pass through to FQuat version.
4554 return ComponentOverlapMultiByChannel(OutOverlaps, PrimComp, Pos, Rot.Quaternion(), TraceChannel, Params, ObjectQueryParams);
4555}
4556
4557FORCEINLINE_DEBUGGABLE bool UWorld::ComponentSweepMulti(TArray<struct FHitResult>& OutHits, class UPrimitiveComponent* PrimComp, const FVector& Start, const FVector& End, const FRotator& Rot, const FComponentQueryParams& Params) const
4558{
4559 // Pass through to FQuat version.
4560 return ComponentSweepMulti(OutHits, PrimComp, Start, End, Rot.Quaternion(), Params);
4561}
4562
4563FORCEINLINE_DEBUGGABLE bool UWorld::ComponentSweepMultiByChannel(TArray<struct FHitResult>& OutHits, class UPrimitiveComponent* PrimComp, const FVector& Start, const FVector& End, const FRotator& Rot, ECollisionChannel TraceChannel, const FComponentQueryParams& Params) const
4564{
4565 // Pass through to FQuat version.
4566 return ComponentSweepMultiByChannel(OutHits, PrimComp, Start, End, Rot.Quaternion(), TraceChannel, Params);
4567}
4568
4569FORCEINLINE_DEBUGGABLE ENetMode UWorld::GetNetMode() const
4570{
4571 // IsRunningDedicatedServer() is a compile-time check in optimized non-editor builds.
4572 if (IsRunningDedicatedServer())
4573 {
4574 return NM_DedicatedServer;
4575 }
4576
4577 return InternalGetNetMode();
4578}
4579
4580FORCEINLINE_DEBUGGABLE bool UWorld::IsNetMode(ENetMode Mode) const
4581{
4582#if UE_EDITOR
4583 // Editor builds are special because of PIE, which can run a dedicated server without the app running with -server.
4584 return GetNetMode() == Mode;
4585#else
4586 // IsRunningDedicatedServer() is a compile-time check in optimized non-editor builds.
4587 if (Mode == NM_DedicatedServer)
4588 {
4589 return IsRunningDedicatedServer();
4590 }
4591 else
4592 {
4593 return !IsRunningDedicatedServer() && (InternalGetNetMode() == Mode);
4594 }
4595#endif
4596}
4597

4599FString ENGINE_API ToString(EWorldType::Type Type);
4600FString ENGINE_API ToString(ENetMode NetMode);
